positive: A retro-futuristic cyberpunk cityscape viewed from a neon-drenched balcony. The art should feature flying vehicles, glowing holographic advertisements, and rain-slicked streets. High contrast, deep blues, magenta, and cyan color scheme. Style inspired by Syd Mead and vaporwave art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, cartoonish, childish, messy lines
